_meta.source: chinahighlights.com (culture/lucky-unlucky/personality/Tai Sui) + desiderate.com.au 2026 Fire Horse配石 + naturaltreasureca/lifestyleasia/alberthern多源交叉 + 五行理论
_meta.for: Chinese Zodiac文章(12生肖×水晶) + 未来Chinese Zodiac Checker工具
notes: 2026 = Year of the Fire Horse (火马年, Feb 17 2026 - Feb 5 2027)
每生肖5个配石字段: lucky_stone(传统共识) / balance_stone(补生肖短板) / year_boost(本年度加持,可年度切换) / fire_horse_2026(2026专属历史留档) / avoid_stone(元素冲突或本命年禁忌)
所有crystal slug已对齐1.crystal-meaning/390库(quartz=clear quartz, lapis=lapis lazuli)
西方zodiac-crystals(12星座)是月分割, Chinese zodiac是年分割+五行, 两者东西方双线独立
本命年(Tai Sui犯太岁): 该生肖年反而不顺, 需避讳石化解 - 这是首饰站独占差异化(vs风水站只讲运气)

★★★ 年度刷新机制(2027及以后): 每年农历新年前, (1)切换topic_context.current_year为新年份 (2)为每个animal的year_boost字段批量重写为新年度对应石 (3)生新年份hub(/chinese-zodiac/{element}-{animal}-{year}/) (4)旧年份hub标记归档但不删(保留历史内链价值), fire_horse_2026字段永久保留作为历史留档, 不再切换
本命佛/五行相生相克/本命年(Tai Sui)/兼容性为文化硬数据, 已在本文件预填锁死, 文章/工具只读不重写

current_year.theme: Boldness, speed, big shifts, amplified ambition. Fire on Fire = double Yang, needs grounding & cooling stones to balance.
current_year.ben_ming_nian_sign: Horse (本命年 — Horses offend Tai Sui in their own year, need protective stones)

next_year_preview.refresh_action: 2027农历新年前切换current_year + 重写每animal.year_boost + 生/chinese-zodiac/fire-goat-2027/ + fire-horse-2026归档

topic_context._note: year_2026 已上移为顶层 current_year (年度切换字段); fire_horse_2026 字段在每个animal内永久留档。

vs_western_zodiac.chinese: Year-based (12-year animal cycle) + 5 elements (Wood/Fire/Earth/Metal/Water) + lunar calendar
vs_western_zodiac.our_positioning: Eastern-inspired brand narrative (藏传/东方玉石/生肖文化); 两条线并存形成东西方双线 (Western zodiac = /{sign}-crystals/, Chinese zodiac = /chinese-zodiac/{animal}-crystals/)

rat.name: Rat
rat.personality: Quick-witted, resourceful, versatile, kind. Three steps ahead, clever with systems and money.

lucky_stone.name: Garnet
lucky_stone.why: Traditional Rat stone across multiple SERP sources. Courage to act on the quiet ideas Rats keep shelving — confidence to stop putting yourself last.

balance_stone.name: Aquamarine
balance_stone.why: Water-element Rat can overthink and drain emotionally. Aquamarine (water stone) soothes the nervous system and clears mental noise.

fire_horse_2026.name: Clear Quartz
fire_horse_2026.why: Fire Horse year amplifies Rat's scattered 'too many ideas' tendency. Clear Quartz focuses one intention so momentum isn't diluted.

avoid_stone.name: Excessively fiery stones (large Ruby/Carnelian stacks)
avoid_stone.why: Rat is Water element; too much Fire-element stone energy is traditionally said to create elemental friction. Use as accent, not dominant. Trust how a stone feels to you over any hard rule.

year_boost.name: Clear Quartz
year_boost.why: Fire Horse year amplifies Rat's scattered 'too many ideas' tendency. Clear Quartz focuses one intention so momentum isn't diluted.
year_boost._switchable: 此字段为年度切换字段; 2027农历新年前重写为Fire Goat年对应石, fire_horse_2026字段保留不动

ox.name: Ox
ox.personality: Diligent, dependable, strong, determined. The steady rock everyone leans on; patient methodical builder.

lucky_stone.name: Jade
lucky_stone.why: Jade is the signature Eastern stone of wisdom, emotional balance and longevity — perfectly mirrors Ox's steady virtue. 'Gold is valuable, jade is priceless.' (China Highlights)

balance_stone.name: Aquamarine
balance_stone.why: Ox's relentless pace in fast Fire Horse year needs calm. Aquamarine cools the nervous system when everyone demands faster, louder.

fire_horse_2026.name: Aventurine
fire_horse_2026.why: 2026 lifts Ox above prior challenges (fengshuimall). Green Aventurine supports the breakthrough opportunities and steady growth.

avoid_stone.name: Overly stimulating stones in large amounts
avoid_stone.why: Ox's strength is steadiness; too much Yang-stimulating energy (large Sunstone stacks) can work against the patient rhythm. Balance is key — trust intuition.

year_boost.name: Aventurine
year_boost.why: 2026 lifts Ox above prior challenges (fengshuimall). Green Aventurine supports the breakthrough opportunities and steady growth.
year_boost._switchable: 此字段为年度切换字段; 2027农历新年前重写为Fire Goat年对应石, fire_horse_2026字段保留不动

tiger.name: Tiger
tiger.personality: Brave, confident, competitive, unpredictable. Bold midlife moves; natural leadership and dramatic courage.

lucky_stone.name: Citrine
lucky_stone.why: Tiger's confidence and 'I deserve this' energy in 2026 (desiderate). Supports money, career, self-worth for bold moves.

balance_stone.name: Blue Sapphire
balance_stone.why: Tiger's spontaneity needs strategic focus. Blue Sapphire adds wisdom so Tiger acts strategically, not just on impulse.

fire_horse_2026.name: Tiger's Eye
fire_horse_2026.why: 2026 = power moves, career breakthroughs for Tiger (fengshui forecast). Tiger's Eye grounds the bold energy into decisive, followed-through action.

avoid_stone.name: Overly sedating stones (large Amethyst/Moonstone stacks daytime)
avoid_stone.why: Tiger's gift is momentum; heavy sedating stones worn in large amounts can blunt the drive. Reserve calming stones for evenings — trust your rhythm.

year_boost.name: Tiger's Eye
year_boost.why: 2026 = power moves, career breakthroughs for Tiger (fengshui forecast). Tiger's Eye grounds the bold energy into decisive, followed-through action.
year_boost._switchable: 此字段为年度切换字段; 2027农历新年前重写为Fire Goat年对应石, fire_horse_2026字段保留不动

rabbit.name: Rabbit
rabbit.personality: Quiet, elegant, kind, responsible. Sensitive, harmony-loving; feels everything deeply.

lucky_stone.name: Moonstone
lucky_stone.why: Rabbit's signature stone for emotional protection and intuition — 'emotional SPF' in fiery Horse year (desiderate). Soft buffer between sensitive Rabbit and the world.

balance_stone.name: Pearl
balance_stone.why: Soothing and classic; calms the nervous system when it whispers 'too much'. Traditional Rabbit stone for kindness and gentleness (alberthern).

fire_horse_2026.name: Amethyst
fire_horse_2026.why: 2026 Rabbit benefits from calm against the year's rapid pace (qilingaura). Amethyst offers spiritual protection and fewer overthinking loops.

avoid_stone.name: Harsh grounding stones in large amounts (large Hematite/Magnetite stacks)
avoid_stone.why: Rabbit's sensitivity thrives on gentle energy; overly dense/heavy grounding stones can feel oppressive. Favor soft stones — trust how they feel.

year_boost.name: Amethyst
year_boost.why: 2026 Rabbit benefits from calm against the year's rapid pace (qilingaura). Amethyst offers spiritual protection and fewer overthinking loops.
year_boost._switchable: 此字段为年度切换字段; 2027农历新年前重写为Fire Goat年对应石, fire_horse_2026字段保留不动

dragon.name: Dragon
dragon.personality: Confident, intelligent, enthusiastic. Strong presence; natural power and influence. The most coveted sign.

lucky_stone.name: Amethyst
lucky_stone.why: Dragon's traditional stone (aureusboutique/desiderate) for spiritual protection, clearer thinking — steers Dragon's power with fewer late-night overthinking loops.

balance_stone.name: Labradorite
balance_stone.why: Shields Dragon's energy when visible and 'on duty' all day (desiderate/gojiakhong). Grounds amplified presence in 2026.

fire_horse_2026.name: Green Aventurine
fire_horse_2026.why: Enhances helpful-people connections and smooth collaboration in 2026 (buddha3bodhi). Dragon's influence grows; this supports relationships, not just solo power.

avoid_stone.name: Excessive Wood-element green stones in huge amounts
avoid_stone.why: Dragon is Earth element; massive Wood-element stacks (large Emerald) are traditionally said to drain Earth. Use green stones as accents. Personal resonance overrules any rule.

year_boost.name: Green Aventurine
year_boost.why: Enhances helpful-people connections and smooth collaboration in 2026 (buddha3bodhi). Dragon's influence grows; this supports relationships, not just solo power.
year_boost._switchable: 此字段为年度切换字段; 2027农历新年前重写为Fire Goat年对应石, fire_horse_2026字段保留不动

snake.name: Snake
snake.personality: Enigmatic, intelligent, wise, perceptive. Senses undercurrents; quietly powerful; intuitive.

lucky_stone.name: Opal
lucky_stone.why: Snake's traditional stone for intuitive upgrades — enhances creativity, intuition, emotional insight (desiderate). Gorgeous for gentle reinvention.

balance_stone.name: Malachite
balance_stone.why: Supports deep shifts, pattern-breaking, honest self-reflection (desiderate). For Snakes who know something must change.

fire_horse_2026.name: Black Tourmaline
fire_horse_2026.why: Snake is Fire element entering another Fire-heavy year — needs grounding protection. Black Tourmaline shields from energetic overload.

avoid_stone.name: Excessively Water stones in huge amounts
avoid_stone.why: Snake is Fire; massive Water-element stacks are traditionally said to extinguish Snake's inner fire. Use blue/water stones sparingly. Trust your own sense of the stone.

snake.ben_ming_nian_note: 2025 was Snake's ben ming nian (just exited). If reading in 2026, the 'just past' Tai Sui echo may linger — protective stones (Black Tourmaline/Obsidian) still helpful early year.

year_boost.name: Black Tourmaline
year_boost.why: Snake is Fire element entering another Fire-heavy year — needs grounding protection. Black Tourmaline shields from energetic overload.
year_boost._switchable: 此字段为年度切换字段; 2027农历新年前重写为Fire Goat年对应石, fire_horse_2026字段保留不动

horse.name: Horse
horse.personality: Animated, active, energetic, independent, charming. Appetite for adventure; says 'go' when the universe opens doors.

lucky_stone.name: Topaz
lucky_stone.why: Horse's traditional lucky stone (lifestyleasia/catcherry). Confidence, courage, calling in right opportunities — especially potent in your own year.

balance_stone.name: Smoky Quartz
balance_stone.why: Grounding and protection — clear 'no thank you' when plate overflows (desiderate). Keeps Horse centred while life speeds up.

fire_horse_2026.name: Black Tourmaline
fire_horse_2026.why: Ben ming nian (本命年) — Horse offends Tai Sui in own year. Black Tourmaline is the protective anchor against the year's instability.

avoid_stone.name: Excessive Fire stones in large stacks (large Ruby/Carnelian/Sunstone)
avoid_stone.why: Horse is Fire + 2026 is Fire Horse = double Fire. Adding more Fire-element stones in huge amounts is traditionally said to over-amp. Favor grounding/cooling stones. Personal resonance first.

horse.ben_ming_nian_note: 2026 IS Horse's ben ming nian (本命年, 犯太岁). Traditionally a year of instability, not pure luck — protective stones (Black Tourmaline, Smoky Quartz, Jade) are the priority, not amplifying stones.

year_boost.name: Black Tourmaline
year_boost.why: Ben ming nian (本命年) — Horse offends Tai Sui in own year. Black Tourmaline is the protective anchor against the year's instability.
year_boost._switchable: 此字段为年度切换字段; 2027农历新年前重写为Fire Goat年对应石, fire_horse_2026字段保留不动

goat.name: Goat (Sheep)
goat.personality: Calm, gentle, sympathetic, creative. Brilliant at caring for others; creative and emotional.

lucky_stone.name: Emerald
lucky_stone.why: Self-worth, creative expression, emotional balance (desiderate). For Goats done apologising for taking up space.

balance_stone.name: Rose Quartz
balance_stone.why: Soft unconditional self-love on frayed days (desiderate). Goats give endlessly; this is the receiving stone.

fire_horse_2026.name: Citrine
fire_horse_2026.why: 2026 = wealth luck + helpful allies for Goat (facebook fengshui). Citrine supports the abundance and confidence to receive.

avoid_stone.name: Cold blue/black stones in large amounts
avoid_stone.why: Goat is Earth + warm tones suit; excessive cold Water-element stones (large Sodalite/Lapis stacks) traditionally clash with Goat's warm nature. Use as accents — trust intuition.

year_boost.name: Citrine
year_boost.why: 2026 = wealth luck + helpful allies for Goat (facebook fengshui). Citrine supports the abundance and confidence to receive.
year_boost._switchable: 此字段为年度切换字段; 2027农历新年前重写为Fire Goat年对应石, fire_horse_2026字段保留不动

monkey.name: Monkey
monkey.personality: Sharp, smart, curious, playful. Easily bored; thrives on novelty and clever problem-solving.

lucky_stone.name: Peridot
lucky_stone.why: Fresh-start energy, lightness, clearing old emotional clutter (desiderate). Monkey's permission slip to shake off groundhog-day routine.

balance_stone.name: Citrine
balance_stone.why: Confidence and 'money magic' when trying something new (desiderate). Pairs with Peridot for new ventures.

fire_horse_2026.name: Clear Quartz
fire_horse_2026.why: Monkey's restless mind needs single-pointed focus in fast 2026. Clear Quartz clarifies one intention among many shiny options.

avoid_stone.name: Excessive Fire stones (large Ruby/Red Jasper stacks)
avoid_stone.why: Monkey is Metal; Fire melts Metal in elemental theory. Large red/Fire stones traditionally clash — use as small accents. Trust your own feel.

year_boost.name: Clear Quartz
year_boost.why: Monkey's restless mind needs single-pointed focus in fast 2026. Clear Quartz clarifies one intention among many shiny options.

rooster.name: Rooster
rooster.personality: Observant, hardworking, courageous, organised. The quiet powerhouse; capable and detail-driven.

lucky_stone.name: Citrine
lucky_stone.why: Visibility, recognition, 'pay me what I'm worth' energy (desiderate). 2026 wants Roosters seen and appreciated properly.

balance_stone.name: Garnet
balance_stone.why: Stamina and strength for busy seasons and big responsibilities (desiderate). Sustains Rooster through demanding periods.

fire_horse_2026.name: Tiger's Eye
fire_horse_2026.why: Combines courage with discernment for Rooster's 2026 push. Turns hard work into recognised achievement.

avoid_stone.name: Excessive Fire stones (large Ruby/Carnelian)
avoid_stone.why: Rooster is Metal + unlucky color is red; Fire-element stones in large amounts traditionally clash. Yellow/gold tones suit better. Trust resonance.

year_boost.name: Tiger's Eye
year_boost.why: Combines courage with discernment for Rooster's 2026 push. Turns hard work into recognised achievement.

dog.name: Dog
dog.personality: Loyal, protective, honest, prudent, values-driven. Cares deeply — sometimes to own detriment.

lucky_stone.name: Clear Quartz / White Topaz
lucky_stone.why: Clarity about what Dog wants next — not just what everyone else needs (desiderate). Clears people-pleasing fog.

balance_stone.name: Black Tourmaline
balance_stone.why: Strong energetic boundaries and protection from emotional overload (desiderate). For Dogs learning 'no' is a complete sentence.

fire_horse_2026.name: Amethyst
fire_horse_2026.why: 2026 Dog benefits from Amitabha Buddha amulet energy (qilingaura) — light, forgiveness, compassion. Amethyst mirrors that protective, clear-hearted quality.

avoid_stone.name: Overly stimulating stones in huge amounts
avoid_stone.why: Dog's gift is steady discernment; excessive Yang-stimulating energy can blur boundaries Dog is building. Balance grounding + clarity stones. Trust intuition.

year_boost.name: Amethyst
year_boost.why: 2026 Dog benefits from Amitabha Buddha amulet energy (qilingaura) — light, forgiveness, compassion. Amethyst mirrors that protective, clear-hearted quality.

pig.name: Pig
pig.personality: Compassionate, generous, diligent, pleasure-loving. Here for good food, good company, a rich life.

lucky_stone.name: Ruby
lucky_stone.why: Joy, passion, life force, abundance that feels good (desiderate). Reminder Pig is allowed to want more — and receive without guilt.

balance_stone.name: Carnelian
balance_stone.why: Confidence to start or finish what matters (desiderate). Warms Pig's natural generosity into self-honoring action.

fire_horse_2026.name: Citrine
fire_horse_2026.why: 2026 supports Pig's abundance theme; Citrine is the classic abundance stone for wealth, optimism, momentum.

avoid_stone.name: Excessive Fire stones in huge stacks
avoid_stone.why: Pig is Water element; too much Fire is traditionally said to create elemental friction. Ruby as signature is fine (resonance); avoid over-stacking Fire stones. Trust your feel.

compliance_note.stance: Eastern-inspired crystal jewellery brand; cultural traditions shared respectfully as symbolic reminders, not deterministic fortune.
allowed_phrases: in Chinese zodiac tradition, ... is linked to
many people wear ... as a symbolic reminder of
often used in mindfulness / intention-setting practices
forbidden_phrases: this stone will bring you luck/wealth
compliance_note.avoid_stone_framing: Frame 'avoid' as elemental-tradition guidance + personal resonance, NOT hard prohibition. Always close with 'trust how a stone feels to you over any hard rule' (mirrors western zodiac-crystals 'use separately' framing).
